## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, refresh planning, and technical audit status.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Workflow:** Bubble approved GrowthX to implement minor tone/style edits from Annette directly, streamlining the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Refresh Strategy:** GrowthX prioritized 27 articles for refresh based on a new data-driven model (clicks, signups), focusing on comparison pieces and high-signup educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Technical Audit:** The comprehensive technical audit is complete; GrowthX is now analyzing the findings to deliver a prioritized list of recommendations for the website, forum, and manual.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Workflow

  - [**Recent Deliverables:** 6 new blogs delivered; Tamara is implementing Annette's feedback on tone and style.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Review Process:** Bubble approved GrowthX to implement minor edits directly.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This streamlines the workflow, as Annette's feedback is consistently minor.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Exception:** GrowthX will flag any major positioning changes for Bubble's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**AI Positioning Guardrail:** GrowthX offered a guardrail for future AI content.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** An optional final step in the Atlas pipeline to cross-reference Bubble product mentions against a master artifact for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Decision:** Not needed now, but a valuable option if positioning issues become frequent.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Production & Refresh Strategy

  - [**Current Production:** 3 new blogs and 2 refreshes are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Refresh Rationale:** Update outdated competitor info and expand Bubble feature mentions (e.g., security) in high-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Article Merged:** "How to Collect Customer Feedback" merged with a similar new article to prevent content duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Action:** Sara to review the merged draft for final sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**AI Image Approval:** AI-generated images (e.g., for "Employee Expense Management System") require final approval from Eve.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Technical Audit & Phase 1 Wrap-up

  - [**Audit Completion:** The comprehensive technical audit is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [**Analysis:** GrowthX is analyzing the findings to deliver a prioritized list of recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [**Scope:** Recommendations will cover the website, manual, forum, and geo-specific channels (YouTube, Reddit, social).](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Phase 1 Summary:** A new Notion doc tracks all completed and in-progress deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sara:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [Review merged "How to Collect Customer Feedback" draft for final sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Record a Loom video with minor formatting feedback for the "Project Management" blog.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Tag Eve in the shared folder for final approval of AI-generated images.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Deliver the prioritized technical audit recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/hFfJz3vG-sb33tXz4akSZGKSsoyyqEBW?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
